docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSTONE PAUL MR. (HILLSBORO PROPERTIES ) HILLSBORO PROPERTIES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LINK WILLIAM MR. LINK LISA NATALE M.MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSTONE PAUL MR. (HILLSBORO PROPERTIES ) HILLSBORO PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSTONE PAUL MR. (HILLSBORO PROPERTIES )

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINK WILLIAM MR. LINK LISA NATALE M.MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILLSBORO PROPERTIES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00, DEFT HILLSBORO PROPERTIES WAIVED DEFECTS IN BEING NAMED AS A DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
